Operation 'validateVatNumber' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. The improved description clarifies: (1) what input is expected (VAT number parameter), (2) what is returned (validation status and company details), (3) that it's a read-only operation with no side effects, and (4) practical use cases within the TaxJar domain (customer verification, exemption management). This helps AI agents understand when to invoke this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Validates an existing VAT identification number against VIES.
data.description_suggestion: Validates a VAT identification number against the VIES (VAT Information Exchange System) database. Accepts a VAT number as input and returns validation status along with company details if valid. This operation performs real-time verification and does not modify any stored data. Useful for verifying customer VAT numbers before processing orders or managing customer exemptions.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. The improved description clarifies: (1) what input is expected (VAT number parameter), (2) what is returned (validation status and company details), (3) that it's a read-only operation with no side effects, and (4) practical use cases within the TaxJar domain (customer verification, exemption management). This helps AI agents understand when to invoke this operation and what to expect.

data.current_summary: Show tax rates for a location

data.current_summary: Summarize tax rates for all regions
data.current_description: Retrieves minimum and average tax rates by region.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aggregated tax rate summaries across all regions where the account has nexus. Useful for verifying customer VAT numbers before processing orders or managing customer exemptions.
